TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kalala ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 459 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 347 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 112 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 73%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kalala hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalala hya' ga Narowan. tay mkyahu' na Kalala hya' ga Sapat. tay 'zil na Kalala hya' ga Maifor. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalala ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalala ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kalala ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa narowan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕapat. taj ʔzil na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kalala ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kalala ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kalala ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 459 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 347 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 112 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 73%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kalala hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalala hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalala hya' ga Narowan. tay mkyahu' na Kalala hya' ga Sapat. tay 'zil na Kalala hya' ga Maifor. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kalala ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalala ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kalala ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa narowan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕapat. taj ʔzil na kalala ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kalala ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kalala ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
